rationale: Educ. Code §38.214 concerns joint rulemaking by the education commissioner and HHSC executive commissioner to implement a health-related subchapter. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Except as otherwise provided by this subchapter, the commissioner of education and the executive commissioner of the Health and Human Services Commission shall jointly adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this rulemaking provision.
